query: page count of Crime and Punishment by Fyodor Dostoevsky in English translation
answer: Crime and Punishment by Fyodor Dostoevsky in English translation has 624 pages in the Liveright edition published in 2019. Other editions, like the Penguin Classics, have 720 pages.

You can take one of our WPM reading speed tests to find your reading speed. Crime and Punishment (Russian: Преступлéние и наказáние, tr. Crime and Punishment is considered the first great novel of his "mature" period of writing.[2]. Crime and Punishment focuses on the mental anguish and moral dilemmas of Rodion Raskolnikov, an impoverished ex-student in St. Petersburg who formulates and executes a plan to kill an unscrupulous pawnbroker for her cash.
